channel.title: Operational System on Jean0t Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Operational System on Jean0t Blog

item.title: Why Linux Is the Best Os
item.description: It is the best, period. I would give a million of reasons to use and why it is the best, but in this case it is highly recommend for everyone to search and try by itself. It is secure As long as windows still have 70% of marketing share, the target for invasions and scammers will always be the most profitable targets, i.e. windows users that do not have any tech literacy.
